lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲੁ ਅਬਲੁ ਕਿਆ ਇਸ ਤੇ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bal abal kiaa is te hoee |4|
lines.english: What power or weakness does she have by herself? ||4||
If she abides with the mortal, then his soul abides in his body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਸ੍ਰਪਨੀ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਤੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eih srapanee taa kee keetee hoee |
lines.english: This she-serpent is created by Him.
By Guru's Grace, Kabeer has easily crossed over. ||5||6||19||
Why bother to read the Simritees to a dog?
Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਾ ਸਾਕਤ ਪਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahaa saakat peh har gun gaae |1|
lines.english: Why bother to sing the Lord's Praises to the faithless cynic? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਮੇ ਰਮਿ ਰਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: raam raam raam rame ram raheeai |
lines.english: Remain absorbed in the Lord's Name, Raam, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਸਿਉ ਭੂਲਿ ਨਹੀ ਕਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saakat siau bhool nahee kaheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Do not bother to speak of it to the faithless cynic, even by mistake. ||1||Pause||
Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, discriminating understanding is attained.
Why offer camphor to a crow?
Why give the snake milk to drink? ||2||
The dog, the faithless cynic, does everything as the Lord causes him to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa su karam kamaaeaa |4|
lines.english: He does the deeds pre-ordained from the very beginning. ||4||
That iron which touches the Philosopher's Stone becomes gold. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਉਆ ਕੋ ਸਹਜੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੫॥੭॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer uaa ko sehaj na jaaee |5|7|20|
lines.english: still, says Kabeer, its natural qualities are not changed. ||5||7||20||
If you take Ambrosial Nectar and irrigate the neem tree with it,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹ ਰਾਵਨ ਘਰ ਖਬਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tih raavan ghar khabar na paaee |1|
lines.english: - there is no news about that house of Raavan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੰਕਾ ਸਾ ਕੋਟੁ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਸੀ ਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: lankaa saa kott samund see khaaee |
lines.english: A fortress like that of Sri Lanka, with the ocean as a moat around it

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਮਾਗਉ ਕਿਛੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa maagau kichh thir na rahaaee |
lines.english: What shall I ask for? Nothing is permanent.
Aasaa:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹ ਰਾਵਨ ਘਰ ਦੀਆ ਨ ਬਾਤੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tih raavan ghar deea na baatee |2|
lines.english: - but in that house of Raavan, the lamps and wicks have gone out. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕੁ ਲਖੁ ਪੂਤ ਸਵਾ ਲਖੁ ਨਾਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik lakh poot savaa lakh naatee |
lines.english: Thousands of sons and thousands of grandsons

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਤ ਨੈਨ ਚਲਿਓ ਜਗੁ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dekhat nain chalio jag jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I see with my eyes that the world is passing away. ||1||Pause||
Under Guru's Instructions, one whose mind is filled with the Lord's Name,

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦੁ ਸੂਰਜੁ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਤਪਤ ਰਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: chand sooraj jaa ke tapat rasoee |
lines.english: The moon and the sun cooked his food.
The fire washed his clothes. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥੮॥੨੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin mukat na hoee |5|8|21|
lines.english: without the Lord's Name, no one is liberated. ||5||8||21||
Says Kabeer, listen, people:
becomes permanent, and does not go anywhere. ||4||
First, the son was born, and then, his mother.
Listen to this wonderful thing, O Siblings of Destiny!
The guru falls at the feet of the disciple. ||1||
Aasaa:
I saw the lion herding the cows. ||1||Pause||
The fish of the water gives birth upon a tree.
The branches are below, and the roots are above.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਪੇਡਿ ਲਗੇ ਫਲ ਫੂਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis kai pedd lage fal foolaa |3|
lines.english: The trunk of that tree bears fruits and flowers. ||3||
I saw a cat carrying away a dog. ||2||
The bull is away, while his load has come home. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਤ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੁ ਇਸ ਪਦ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: kehat kabeer ju is pad boojhai |
lines.english: Says Kabeer, one who understands this hymn,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਮਤ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੂਝੈ ॥੫॥੯॥੨੨॥
lines.translit: raam ramat tis sabh kichh soojhai |5|9|22|
lines.english: and chants the Lord's Name, comes to understand everything. ||5||9||22||
22 Chau-Padhay And Panch-Padhay
Riding a horse, the buffalo takes him out to graze.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀਉ ਕੇ ਤਿਪਦੇ ੮ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ੭ ਇਕਤੁਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa sree kabeer jeeo ke tipade 8 dutuke 7 ikatukaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa Of Kabeer Jee, 8 Thri-Padhay, 7 Dho-Thukay, 1 Ik-Tuka:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿੰਦੁ ਤੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਕੀਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਕੁੰਡ ਰਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bind te jin pindd keea agan kundd rahaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord created the body from sperm, and protected it in the fire pit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਸ ਮਾਸ ਮਾਤਾ ਉਦਰਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: das maas maataa udar raakhiaa bahur laagee maaeaa |1|
lines.english: For ten months He preserved you in your mother's womb, and then, after you were born, you became attached to Maya. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਜਨਮਿ ਕਰਮ ਭੂਮਿ ਬੀਜੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੋਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorab janam karam bhoom beej naahee boeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You did not plant the seeds of good actions in the earth of your past lives. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਕਾਹੇ ਕਉ ਲੋਭਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਰਤਨ ਜਨਮੁ ਖੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: praanee kaahe kau lobh laage ratan janam khoeaa |
lines.english: O mortal, why have you attached yourself to greed, and lost the jewel of life?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਜਮੁ ਆਇ ਝੋਟ ਪਕਰੈ ਤਬਹਿ ਕਾਹੇ ਰੋਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa jam aae jhott pakarai tabeh kaahe roeaa |2|
lines.english: When the Messenger of Death comes and grabs you by your hair, why do you cry out then? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਰਿਕ ਤੇ ਬਿਰਧਿ ਭਇਆ ਹੋਨਾ ਸੋ ਹੋਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baarik te biradh bheaa honaa so hoeaa |
lines.english: From an infant, you have grown old. That which was to happen, has happened.
